headline: Fervo Energy Expands Board of Directors, Adding Four Directors with Deep Expertise in Energy, Finance, Engineering, and Governance
summary: Jessica Uhl Independent Director Meg Whitman Lead Independent Director Trey Lowe Director Robert Keehan Independent Director HOUSTON, April 14, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Fervo Energy today announced the appointment of four new members to its Board of Directors: Meg Whitman as Lead Independent Director, Robert Keehan and Jessica Uhl as Independent Directors, and Trey Lowe as Director. With these appointments, Fervo’s Board of Directors now includes Meg Whitman, Robert Keehan, Jessica Uhl, Trey Low
